data.title: Fatal incident at Simandou project in Guinea. Employee of contracting company dies at SimFer mine. Rio Tinto offers support.
data.description: In London, Rio Tinto sadly reports the death of a contractor employee at the SimFer mine site in Nzérékoré, Guinea on August 22. CEO Jakob Stausholm expressed deep regret and condolences to the affected individuals. The company promises full support to the bereaved and will conduct a comprehensive investigation into the incident. The tragic event underscores the importance of prioritizing safety in mining operations. The loss is deeply felt by the community and all those connected, highlighting the need for continued vigilance in workplace safety measures.

data.title: July existing-home sales up by 2.0% per NAR report, providing crucial data for real estate industry.
data.description: In Washington, D.C., on August 21, 2025, it was reported that existing-home sales saw a notable uptick of 2.0% in July as per the latest data from the National Association of REALTORS® Existing-Home Sales Report. This report serves as a valuable resource for the real estate community, offering insights into crucial factors such as home sales volume, pricing trends, and inventory levels.

data.title: Themes ETFs has relaunched Humanoid Robotics ETF (Ticker: BOTT) for low-cost investment in human-interactive robots, autonomous systems, assistive tech, and AI, trading on NASDAQ with an expense ratio of 0.35%.
data.description: In Greenwich, Connecticut, on August 19, 2025, Themes ETFs relaunched the Themes Humanoid Robotics ETF (Ticker: BOTT). This ETF offers affordable access to companies at the forefront of human-interactive robot development, autonomous systems used in industry and logistics, healthcare assistive technologies, and the AI and computing infrastructure facilitating the advancement of next-generation robotics. BOTT remains listed on NASDAQ with an incredibly low expense ratio of 0.35%, making it an attractive option for investors looking to capitalize on the robotics industry.

data.title: Inspira receives $27M government order for ART100 Systems with payment in 2025 from African ministry of health.
data.description: Inspira™ Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd., based in Ra'anana, Israel, revealed on August 19, 2025, that a national ministry of health in Africa has made a significant stride in healthcare by placing a substantial $27 million binding purchase order for Inspira’s FDA-cleared ART100 systems. The ministry's procurement was facilitated by Inspira's exclusive distribution partner, focused solely on bringing Inspira's innovative life-support and diagnostic technologies to market. This purchase order kickstarts a rapid nationwide deployment program, signaling a promising advancement in healthcare infrastructure.

data.title: Fed's Jackson Hole Symposium focuses on labor markets and inflation. VOO ETF drops 2%. Powell to speak on economic outlook and rate decisions.
data.description: The Federal Reserve's Jackson Hole Economic Symposium is set to begin, with Chair Jerome Powell's highly anticipated speech on Friday likely to provide hints on interest rate cuts. The VOO ETF dropped nearly 2% this week, prompting considerations of a buying opportunity. The theme of the event, "Labor Markets in Transition," reflects the challenges faced by the Fed amid a cooling job market and above-target inflation. Powell's speech on "Economic Outlook and Framework Review" may offer insights into the Fed's approach ahead of its September 17 rate decision. The Fed's July meeting minutes highlighted concerns about inflation risks outweighing unemployment risks, with tariffs impacting data, especially goods price inflation. Details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ethereum gaming network creators sue xAI for brand confusion, blaming controversies like Grok's MechaHitler for harm.
data.description: Xai, the company supporting the Ethereum network, expressed concerns regarding brand confusion and controversies, such as Grok's MechaHitler incident, impacting their reputation negatively. The company stressed that these issues have caused significant damage to their brand image.

data.title: MaxgenBit emerges as AI-driven trading leader with focus on security, performance and ROI in digital assets. AI engine processes real-time market data, multiple asset support, secure encryption, 99.9% system availability, and streamlined account setup with KYC & AML compliance on the official website.
data.description: MaxgenBit has emerged as a prominent force in AI-driven trading, setting new standards for security, performance, and ROI. The platform integrates advanced machine learning algorithms with stringent security protocols to offer real-time market analysis and execution. It prioritizes automation and risk management tools, attracting traders with its consistent performance. MaxgenBit supports various asset classes, offers high-speed automation aided by adaptive algorithms, and features multiple security measures. The platform boasts AI-driven automation, multi-asset support, advanced analytical tools, and cross-device accessibility. It follows robust security measures, achieving high-speed processing and consistent uptime. MaxgenBit's account setup process is secure, complying with global financial standards. The platform positions itself as a trusted solution for individuals and institutions in the digital asset economy by combining encryption, compliance measures, and high-performance trading capabilities.

data.title: Global containerized BESS market to reach $35.82 billion by 2030 with a CAGR of 20.9%. Fueled by rising demand.
data.description: A report by MarketsandMarkets™ predicts that the worldwide containerized BESS market will experience significant growth, with an expected increase from USD 13.87 billion in 2025 to USD 35.82 billion by 2030. This growth reflects a compound annual growth rate of 20.9%. The rising demand for BESS is a key factor driving this expansion.

It is projected to increase from USD 39.16 billion in 2025 to USD 95.49 billion by 2030 at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 19.5% during the forecast period. The report includes analysis from 320 market data tables and 65...

data.title: Elon Musk's AI "mothership" project could redefine technology, as new presentation by James Altucher reveals.
data.description: During a recent presentation, James Altucher revealed Elon Musk's massive AI project known as the "mothership," highlighting its potential to revolutionize the tech industry. The project's scale and implications underscore Musk's ambitious vision for the future, signaling a significant shift in how AI technologies could shape various sectors.

data.title: Biobanking market to reach $11.82 billion by 2030 with 9.1% CAGR, starting at $7.65 billion in 2025.
data.description: In August 2025, in Delray Beach, Florida, the Biobanking Market was reported to have a value of US$7.65 billion, a slight increase from US$7.16 billion in the previous year. Projections indicate a strong Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 9.1% from 2025 to 2030. By the end of this period, the market is expected to reach a forecasted value of US$11.82 billion.

data.title: Brazilian Bruno Oliveira transforms waste into Bitcoin fortune by collecting discarded cans from streets in São Paulo. Nicknamed "the Crypto Scrapper," he converts cans to BTC, one Satoshi at a time.
data.description: A resident from Brazil, Bruno Oliveira, known as "The Crypto Scrapper," has been quietly amassing a fortune in Bitcoin by collecting discarded cans in the streets of São Paulo. Preferring Bitcoin over other cryptocurrencies, Oliveira believes in its long-term potential and chooses to build his wealth by selling recycled cans and using the proceeds to buy Bitcoin. Often sharing photos of himself biking around the city to find cans, Oliveira's unconventional approach has garnered attention. He emphasizes the idea of "doing what needs to be done, one can at a time, one Satoshi at a time." His unique method has allowed him to accumulate a significant amount of Bitcoin, showcasing an alternative means of cryptocurrency investment away from the traditional avenues favored by institutional investors.

data.title: Brazil imposes 17.5% crypto tax, signaling a global shift towards taxing digital assets for revenue, impacting global crypto investment.
data.description: The implementation of a 17.5% tax on cryptocurrencies in Brazil is significant, indicating a trend towards governments seeking to generate revenue from digital assets. This move suggests a shift away from the previous era of tax-friendly cryptocurrency investing on a global scale.

data.title: Pro Padel League partners with Wölffer Estate Vineyard to bring Padel to Hamptons with Wölffer Estate Vineyard PPL All-Star 2025 event over Labor Day weekend.
data.description: In New York, the Pro Padel League (PPL) has announced a new partnership with Wölffer Estate Vineyard to host the Wölffer Estate Vineyard PPL All-Star 2025 event. This will be a unique showcase of professional padel featuring top players from around the world. The event will take place over Labor Day weekend on a specially constructed padel court at Wölffer Estate Vineyard in the Hamptons. Padel, the fastest-growing racquet sport globally, will be highlighted in this prestigious event which is set to attract a large audience.

data.title: Actelis Networks to reorganize operations via AI, offshoring, outsourcing, aiming for 20% expense reduction by 2025.
data.description: A company intends to optimize its operations by integrating AI and implementing offshoring and outsourcing strategies to enhance agility and flexibility across product delivery, operations, and administration. The plan also involves bolstering sales in lucrative growth sectors and regions. This initiative is projected to lead to a 20% decrease in quarterly expenses by the conclusion of 2025.

data.title: New York's office return surpasses pre-pandemic levels, up 1.3% in July 2025. National average down 25.6%.
data.description: As of July 2025, New York City has seen a 1.3% increase in office visits compared to the same month in 2019, marking the first major U.S. city to surpass pre-pandemic office traffic levels. This rise is attributed to corporate giants investing billions in new towers. However, the rest of America is not following suit, with office foot traffic nationwide still down by 25.6% from pre-pandemic levels. Los Angeles, San Francisco, Chicago, and Washington D.C. are among the cities with the largest declines, with numbers ranging from 30.9% to 40%. Miami is the only city close to New York's recovery at a difference of -0.1%. The article questions whether New York is an exception in the return-to-office trend, as it stands out in bouncing back from remote work despite being the city initially hit hardest by the pandemic. Full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: FS introduces 800G LPO optical module for AI/HPC data centers in New Castle, Del., boasting low power consumption and reduced latency.
data.description: In New Castle, Delaware, a new 800G LPO optical module has been launched by FS, designed to support AI and HPC data centers. This innovative module boasts ultra-low power consumption, reduced latency, and proven reliability. The module aims to enhance data center performance with its high-speed capabilities.

data.title: Luxury travel brand Explora Journeys partners with tennis star Jannik Sinner as new ambassador.
data.description: On August 23, 2025, in Geneva, the luxury lifestyle ocean travel brand Explora Journeys, owned by the MSC Group, revealed its collaboration with tennis sensation Jannik Sinner. The acclaimed athlete will now represent the brand as its ambassador. This news arrives shortly before...

data.title: Monport AutoForge: World's 1st automatic loading laser engraver hits Kickstarter goal in 1 hour.
data.description: On August 23, 2025, in New York, significant progress is being made with the Monport AutoForge, a groundbreaking laser engraver featuring a fully automated loading system. This innovative project has gained rapid momentum upon its launch on Kickstarter. Surpassing its funding target in just one hour of the campaign, the Monport AutoForge has created a buzz in the industry.
